objective: Remove the obsolete Wrangler 4.x --non-interactive flag from the governance-owned Cloudflare Pages deploy gate while preserving CI=true non-interactive behavior.
scope_boundary: Issue #530 owns only the Pages deploy gate Wrangler command flag fix, focused test update, operator docs/feature registry wording, and validation evidence.
Keep Secret Provisioning UX behavior, approval gating, build flow, pre-deploy hooks, and deployment evidence format unchanged.
Do not run a live Cloudflare Pages deploy from this governance fix.
out_of_scope: Changing Cloudflare token scopes or provisioning paths.
Running or approving a production deploy.
research_summary: Wrangler 4.x rejects --non-interactive on pages deploy. The gate already sets CI=true in the child process environment, which is the supported non-interactive behavior for current Wrangler releases. The focused test should assert the removed flag is absent and CI=true remains present.

sprints.name: Wrangler 4.x deploy flag compatibility
sprints.goal: Unblock Pages deploy gate adoption on current Wrangler by removing the unsupported CLI flag.
tasks: Remove --non-interactive from the wrangler pages deploy command.
Update focused tests to assert CI=true is still passed and --non-interactive is absent.
Update runbook and feature registry wording.
Run focused tests, provisioning evidence scan, structured plan validation, execution scope assertion, and local CI gate.
acceptance_criteria: scripts/pages-deploy/pages_deploy_gate.py no longer passes --non-interactive to wrangler pages deploy.
The deploy command still runs with CI=true in the child environment.
Focused tests cover absence of --non-interactive and presence of CI=true.
Docs no longer claim the gate invokes Wrangler with --non-interactive.
Local validation and GitHub checks pass before issue #530 closes.

specialist_reviews.focus: Confirm the fix is a narrow Wrangler CLI compatibility update and not a deploy gate redesign.
specialist_reviews.summary: The only runtime command change needed is removing --non-interactive; CI=true remains the non-interactive guard.

alternate_model_review.summary: This lane removes a removed CLI flag and updates deterministic tests/docs only; no architecture or policy behavior changes are introduced.

execution_handoff.approved_scope_summary: Issue #530 may update the Pages deploy Wrangler command, focused test, docs, feature registry, and issue-owned governance evidence artifacts.
execution_handoff.next_execution_step: Run validation, open PR, wait for checks, merge under repository automerge rules, and close issue #530.

material_deviation_rules: If fixing Wrangler compatibility requires changing deploy approval, secret provisioning, or downstream consumer behavior, stop and route that work to the relevant Cloudflare Pages deploy gate child issue.

If validation evidence would contain credentials, signed URLs, Authorization headers, raw phone numbers, generated env files, or screenshots containing credentials, replace it with redacted structured evidence before commit.
